violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. - Several food items uncovered in prep cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Filter/Fan above warming table in need of cleaning.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. - Bucket with premixed bleach/soap next to sink for washing hands while water tank is not available for running water.

Mobile food service establishment. — --Water supply system was not designed, constructed, and/or maintained. - No water tank during event. In the process of replacing the tank. No running water in mobile unit until new one is installed.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. -Splash-less bleach being used as sanitizer.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -No water was available other than bottled water. Plumbing system was inadequate.
